lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic attention to be roadworthy. The engine runs but has a persistent knock, and the transmission struggles with shifting. The exterior has noticeable body damage, including heavy rust along the rocker panels and several large dents. Inside, the upholstery is heavily stained and torn. This car is being sold as-is, making it an ideal candidate for a parts car or a dedicated restoration project for someone with the right tools.
This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior is flawless with no scratches or wear. The interior is pristine and shows no signs of use. All mechanical systems are functioning perfectly.
This vehicle is in mint condition. It is mechanically perfect and shows no signs of wear on either the interior or exterior. The car has been meticulously maintained and is in like-new condition.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a dependable option for those seeking a functional daily driver. The exterior shows several signs of its age, including minor clear coat failure on the hood and a few noticeable scratches along the passenger side doors. Inside, the cabin is clean but shows wear on the high-traffic touchpoints, such as the steering wheel and the driver's seat bolster. Mechanically, the car starts reliably and shifts smoothly, though it is approaching the interval for a major scheduled service. It is a solid choice for someone who values mechanical reliability over cosmetic perfection.

Ready for a project? This vehicle is the ultimate bargain for a mechanic or a DIY enthusiast looking for a challenge! While it has definitely seen a lot of life and needs significant repairs and cosmetic attention, it offers a super-affordable way to get into a car if you're willing to put in the effort to bring it back to

This expertly maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Rigorously inspected to ensure mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal, it offers a refined balance of performance and reliability. With a comprehensive service history and a well-preserved interior, this specimen stands as a testament to diligent ownership. We invite you to experience a vehicle that delivers consistent excellence and a sophisticated road presence.

Hey there! I’m parting with my reliable ride, and it’s been such a joy to drive! It’s in really solid shape and has plenty of life left for its next owner. Everything runs smoothly, and it's been well-cared for over the years. It's the perfect dependable car for your daily commutes or weekend getaways. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

Used vehicle. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Ready for pickup.

This exceptionally well-cared-for vehicle presents a fantastic opportunity for a discerning buyer. The exterior retains a brilliant luster, showing only the lightest evidence of careful use, while the alloy wheels are free of major scuffs. Inside, the cabin feels fresh and inviting; the leather seating is in great shape with no cracks or stains, and every electronic component—from the dual-zone climate control to the infotainment system—works exactly as intended. Under the hood, the engine is clean and runs quietly, backed by a comprehensive service log that documents regular oil changes and scheduled maintenance. The tires have ample tread remaining, and the brakes provide firm, confident stopping power. This is a non-smoker's car that has been primarily garaged, offering a smooth, reliable driving experience that feels tight and responsive on the road. Includes all original manuals and two key fobs.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, this model offers a balanced synthesis of performance and value. Each component has been vetted to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for roadworthiness and comfort. We invite you to experience the refined engineering and reliable operation of this exceptional offering.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a refined aesthetic, it has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for performance and safety. Offering a harmonious balance of luxury and dependability, this selection provides significant value for those seeking a high-caliber driving experience without the premium of a new vehicle purchase.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and she's been such a joy to own! It's in really solid shape and has been super reliable for all my daily commutes and weekend trips. Everything runs smoothly, and the interior is still looking great! I’ve taken really good care of it, and I’m sure you’re going to love driving it as much as I have. Feel free to reach out if you want to take it for a spin!
This E46 M3 is a mechanically sound example of BMW’s engineering peak, featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six engine equipped with six individual throttle bodies for surgical throttle response
Used vehicle. Good condition. Maintenance records available. Clean interior. Minor exterior wear. Runs smooth.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect blend of performance and comfort, presenting in impressive condition both inside and out. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, showing only the minor, negligible signs of road use typical of a well-cared-for car. Step inside to a smoke-free cabin where the premium upholstery remains supple and every electronic feature—from the dual-zone climate control to the intuitive infotainment system—functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is robust; it has been serviced regularly, shifts smoothly through all gears, and sits on a set of high-tread tires ready for the road ahead. This is a reliable, turn-key opportunity for a buyer who values quality and a documented history of care.

This exceptional vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating a consistent history of professional maintenance and care, the car remains in commendable condition, offering both mechanical reliability and a refined aesthetic. Its performance characteristics align with the high standards expected of its class, making it a sophisticated choice for those seeking value without compromise. We invite you to experience the caliber of this offering firsthand.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical reliability and aesthetic refinement. Having undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection, this unit remains in commendable condition, offering a balanced fusion of performance and value. It represents an exceptional acquisition for the discerning driver seeking a high-caliber automotive experience without the premium of a brand-new model.

Hi everyone! 👋 Up for grabs is my awesome ride! It’s been super reliable and still looks fantastic inside and out. It's in wonderful condition and runs like a dream—perfect for your daily commute or a fun weekend getaway. You’re going to love how it handles! Let me know if you want to come see it and take it for a spin!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and high-pressure double-VANOS variable valve timing. The chassis remains taut with upgraded Bilstein dampers and a reinforced rear subframe to handle the torque output. Power is managed by a crisp 6-speed manual gearbox and a factory GKN limited-slip differential. This example is mechanically sorted, showing strong compression across all cylinders and a responsive throttle map. Finished in Titanium Silver, it represents a driver-focused machine ready for the canyons.
Used car. Good condition. Clean title. Regular maintenance performed. Runs well.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes an ideal balance between daily utility and refined comfort. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous finish with only minor cosmetic blemishes consistent with responsible ownership, while the frame and body remain solid and well-preserved. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free, featuring supple leather upholstery with minimal wear and a full suite of electronics that function exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is in robust health; it has been serviced strictly according to the manufacturer’s schedule, resulting in a smooth, responsive engine and a transmission that shifts seamlessly. With a quiet ride and a comprehensive service history, this car represents a dependable, turn-key opportunity for a buyer seeking quality without the new-car price tag.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, which exemplifies consistent care and mechanical integrity. This well-appointed model offers a sophisticated driving experience, balancing robust performance with a refined interior. Having undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection, it stands as a premier choice for the discerning driver seeking both reliability and value. Secure this exceptional opportunity to acquire a vehicle of proven quality and enduring appeal.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent care and mechanical integrity, it offers a refined driving experience and reliable performance. Our comprehensive multi-point inspection confirms its robust condition, ensuring this selection provides exceptional long-term value within its class.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, she’s been such a joy to own. It’s in solid shape, super reliable, and still looks great parked in the driveway. If you're looking for a dependable car that’s been well-loved and is ready for its next adventure, you’ve found it! Let's get you behind the wheel!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the legendary S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six, delivering linear power through individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing. The 6-speed Getrag manual transmission pairs with a factory limited-slip differential for precise torque vectoring. Recent service includes a comprehensive cooling system overhaul and a proactive subframe reinforcement to ensure structural integrity under high lateral loads. The suspension retains its factory-spec McPherson strut front and multi-link rear geometry, offering exceptional feedback and chassis balance. Mechanically robust and meticulously maintained, this high-revving icon is ready for the technical B-roads.
Used car. Good condition. Regularly maintained. Clean interior. Minor exterior cosmetic wear. Runs well.

This vehicle strikes a perfect balance between performance and practicality, maintaining a clean and professional appearance. The exterior paint retains its original luster with only minor, expected road wear, while the interior is a smoke-free environment featuring well-preserved upholstery and fully functional electronics. Mechanically sound and consistently serviced, it offers a smooth, quiet ride and responsive handling. Whether for daily commuting or weekend getaways, this car provides a reliable and comfortable experience. It comes recently detailed and inspected, ready for immediate enjoyment by a driver who appreciates a well-maintained machine.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, which demonstrates a high standard of mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Rigorously inspected to ensure it meets our exacting benchmarks for performance, this unit offers a sophisticated balance of reliability and value. It remains a premier choice for the discerning driver who prioritizes quality and a proven service history.
